entry.title: About Me
entry.content:
徐昕宇 Xinyu Xu

Introduction

I’m a 4-th year undergraduate student in Computer Science and Engineering Department, School of Electronic Information and Electrical Engineering (SEIEE), Shanghai Jiao Tong University (SJTU), expected to graduate in 2022.

Currently, I’m a research assistant in MVIG lab advised by Prof.Cewu Lu. My research interests include computer vision, robotics and a broader range of intelligent systems. I am going to be an M.S. student in the same institute since 2022 Fall.

News!

[Mar. 2022] One paper is accepted by CVPR 2022.
[Oct. 2021] One paper is accepted by IEEE T’PAMI.
[Sept. 2021] I’m awarded National Scholarship! Thanks!

Education

  • Shanghai Jiao Tong University (2018.09 - Present)
    Department of Computer Science and Engineering, SEIEE.
    Engineering Honor Program, Zhiyuan College.

    B.Eng. student major in Computer Science and Engineering.

Publication

    Learning to Anticipate Future with Dynamic Context Removal
    Xinyu Xu, Yong-Lu Li, Cewu Lu
    CVPR 2022


    Learning Single/Multi-Attribute of Object with Symmetry and Group
    Yong-Lu Li, Yue Xu, Xinyu Xu , Xiaohan Mao, Cewu Lu
    IEEE T'PAMI


Honors and Awards

  • National Scholarship2021
  • SJTU Outstanding Graduate2022
  • Fushou Li Sieyuan Scholarship (Special-class)2019
  • Zhiyuan Honor Scholarship 2019 & 2020 & 2021
  • SJTU Undergraduate Merit Scholarship2019 & 2020 & 2021
  • Finalist Award in the Interdisciplinary Contest in Modeling (ICM)2019
  • First prize in National College Student Mathematical Contest2019 & 2020

Service

Academic Service

Conferece Reviewer: CVPR 2022, ECCV 2022

Teaching Service

2021 Spring. Data Structure (Honor). Teaching Assistant
2022 Spring. Data Structure (Honor). Teaching Assistant

Interests

Sports: Soccer ⚽, Tennis 🥎
Game: CS:GO, DOTA2 💻, Mahjong 🀄, Holdem 🃏
entry.summary: 徐昕宇 Xinyu Xu
